impact: Keeps future PP&D demolition requirement extractor proposals small and reviewable by enforcing a 180-line ceiling, rejecting dataclass-based generated structures, and flagging broad generated-module patterns before acceptance.
summary: Add a narrow replacement-size guard test for the demolition permit requirements extractor.
target_task: Task checkbox-91: Add a one-file replacement-size guard test for `ppd.extraction.demolition_permit_requirements` proposals that rejects broad generated modules and requires the extractor implementation to stay under 180 physical lines with no dataclasses.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
